data.title: Solana Mobile set to introduce SKR token linked to Seeker phone in January, with 10 billion tokens in circulation.
data.description: Solana Mobile has announced the forthcoming launch of its SKR token, linked to the Seeker phone, scheduled for early next year. The token will have a total supply of 10 billion tokens.
ECB board member Cipollone says the bank will adhere to G7 communique language on FX when asked about a potential Japanese intervention to support the yen – Nikkei interview.
ECB's Cipollone: We are assuming that the savings rate will go down; if it doesn't materialise, we will need to act.

data.title: Klarna introduces AI for Climate Resilience Program to aid climate adaptation in global regions. #AIforClimate
data.description: Klarna, a leading global digital bank and payments provider, has introduced its AI for Climate Resilience Program in Stockholm. Through leveraging artificial intelligence, the initiative aims to enhance climate adaptation and community resilience in heavily impacted regions worldwide. This global program by Klarna is dedicated to expediting the utilization of AI in addressing the specific challenges brought about by climate change. It seeks out and backs innovators who are creating practical solutions.

data.title: UMC's reported net sales for November 2025 reached NT$21,233,847, with Y/Y change of 5.91%. Year to Date revenue was NT$218,272,475, a Y/Y increase of 2.31%.
data.description: In Taiwan, United Microelectronics Corporation (UMC) released its unaudited net sales report for November 2025. The revenues for November 2025 amounted to NT$21,233,847, showing an increase of NT$1,184,665 compared to November 2024, representing a 5.91% year-on-year growth. From January to November 2025, the total revenue reached NT$218,272,475, which is NT$4,935,709 higher than the same period in 2024, indicating a 2.31% year-on-year increase. All monetary figures are in thousands of New Taiwan Dollars (NT$), and the percentage values represent the year-on-year changes. For more details about UMC, interested parties can find additional information on the company's website.

data.title: Traefik Labs partners with HPE Unleash AI, offering Triple Gate security architecture to HPE Private Cloud AI.
data.description: Traefik Labs has recently become a member of the HPE Unleash AI partner program in Barcelona, Spain. By introducing its Triple Gate security architecture to HPE Private Cloud AI, Traefik Labs aims to enhance security measures in the partnership.
INDIA CLINCHES $2 BILLION RUSSIA SUBMARINE DEAL AS PUTIN VISITS

data.title: CKGSB concluded 12th Women in Leadership Forum in Beijing, discussing female entrepreneurship in China's digital economy.
data.description: In Beijing on December 2, 2025, the Cheung Kong Graduate School of Business (CKGSB) organized the 2025 Women in Leadership Forum, marking its 12th year. This event has emerged as a prominent platform in China fostering discussions on women's leadership.
Ex-Guangxi government chairman Lan Tianli loses party membership and public office following serious legal and disciplinary infractions – CCTV.
Key Japan officials wouldn't block a BoJ December hike - People familiar

data.title: By January 2025, MATIC aims $0.42-$0.45 recovery despite current weakness, with 10-18% upside potential.
data.description: Predictions for the price of MATIC indicate a potential increase of 10-18% to reach a range between $0.42 and $0.45 by January 2025. However, the current support levels are facing immediate pressure around $0.38.

data.title: Nuvoton debuts high-power violet laser diode (402nm, 1.7W) in TO-56 CAN package, setting industry standard.
data.description: Nuvoton Technology Corporation Japan (NTCJ) based in Kyoto, Japan, revealed on December 4, 2025, the introduction of their latest product, a compact high-power violet laser diode. This innovative technology operates at 402nm wavelength and boasts an impressive 1.7W optical output power. The device is contained within the industry-standard TO-56 CAN package. Notably, this violet laser diode from NTCJ sets new standards in the industry with its exceptional output power.

data.title: S.Pellegrino partners with Ferrari to attract younger audiences and strengthen global brand position.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, in Milan, an announcement was made regarding a strategic alliance involving S.Pellegrino, a renowned sparkling mineral water brand. The purpose of this partnership is to enhance S.Pellegrino's premium lifestyle image, increase its connection with younger demographics, and improve its worldwide brand portfolio. This long-term alliance is aimed at expanding the brand's reach and appeal in the global market.

data.title: mAbxience and HP partner to develop AI solution for biomanufacturing, aiming to optimize production process of monoclonal antibodies and biosimilars.
data.description: In Madrid on December 4, 2025, mAbxience, a subsidiary of Fresenius, partnered with HP Inc., a leading technology company, to launch a groundbreaking project. This collaboration aims to create an advanced artificial intelligence (AI) tool that enhances the manufacturing process for monoclonal antibodies and biosimilars. The innovative project is set to revolutionize the production processes, with a focus on improving efficiency and quality control.

data.title: iOnctura begins Phase I/II trial in myelofibrosis patients, combining roginolisib with ruxolitinib. 1st patient dosed.
data.description: The initial participant has received medication in the Phase I/II HEMA-MED clinical study (NCT06887803) to assess the tolerability and effectiveness of roginolisib, a PI3Kδ inhibitor, along with ruxolitinib in individuals with myelofibrosis (MF) who have not responded to Janus kinase (JAK) inhibitors. This dual-target strategy involves a combination of PI3Kδ and JAK inhibitors to address the needs of patients with MF.

data.title: Clarivate introduces Regulatory AI Assistant to enhance accuracy and speed for regulatory teams.
data.description: Using cutting-edge artificial intelligence technology, Clarivate Plc (NYSE: CLVT) has recently introduced advanced features designed to enhance the precision and speed of decision-making for regulatory teams. These new tools aim to facilitate smoother operations throughout the product lifecycle. This development was announced in London on December 4, 2025.

data.title: Polkadot Capital Group and Zodia Custody partner to enhance institutional access to digital assets in Polkadot ecosystem.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, Polkadot Capital Group, a division of Polkadot focusing on capital markets, partnered with Zodia Custody, an institution-centric digital assets custodian. The collaboration aims to enhance institutional understanding of Zodia's custody services for Polkadot.

data.title: Thunes wins 'Cross-Border Payment Infrastructure of the Year' at Payments Awards. London, Dec. 4, 2025.
data.description: At an award ceremony in London on December 4, 2025, Thunes was recognized for its global payment innovation and significant impact on the industry. Thunes, known as the Smart Superhighway for international money transfers, received the prestigious title of 'Cross-Border Payment Infrastructure of the Year' at the 13th Annual Payments Awards. This acknowledgment highlights Thunes' leadership in facilitating seamless financial transactions on a global scale through its innovative payment solutions.

data.title: Stairhopper Movers LLC to be featured on "All Access with Andy Garcia" on Dec. 4, 2025, discussing reliability in the relocation services industry.
data.description: In Los Angeles on December 4, 2025, the upcoming episode of "All Access with Andy Garcia" will showcase Stairhopper Movers LLC on Public Television. The segment will delve into critical aspects that signify dependability and expertise in the moving services sector.
